questions.question: Given f(x,y) = x²y + 3xy², compute the partial derivatives ∂f/∂x and ∂f/∂y using the definition of partial differentiation.
keyPoints: Treat y as constant when differentiating with respect to x

questions.question: If z = f(x,y) where x = u² + v and y = uv, use the chain rule to find ∂z/∂u in terms of u, v, and the partial derivatives of f.
For f(x,y) = x² + y² at point P(1,1), compute the directional derivative in the direction of vector v = (1,1). Also state the maximum rate of change at P.
Given transformation T: (u,v) → (x,y) where x = u² - v² and y = 2uv, compute the Jacobian matrix and determinant at point (u,v) = (1,1). Explain the geometric significance.
keyPoints: Geometric significance: represents local area scaling factor for transformation
